profiles.name: Authority boundary recognition
hard_gates: state Bitcoin gives version authority, not truth authority

profiles.name: Reference verification
hard_gates: check at least one reference path beyond ordinary page reading
report source, access path, date, and limitation
profiles.minimal_claim_note: A B1 external reference check may support minimal V2, but does not constitute full reference coverage.
profiles.low_agent_summary: Check one Bitcoin Original on an external explorer for minimal V2, or multiple reference paths for strong V2.
profiles.if_missing_downgrade_to: V1 if no explorer check performed

profiles.name: Hash verification
hard_gates: compute at least one declared hash locally
compare expected hash and computed hash
report command, artifact, expected hash, computed hash

conditional_requirements.then: every hash entry must have expected_hash_source and expected_hash_authority_class
expected_hash_authority_class must be canonical_manifest_hash or repository_manifest_hash

forbidden_claims: direct Arweave verification unless Arweave data was extracted
Ethereum witness verified unless ETH transaction/input checked
profiles.minimal_claim_note: One valid declared hash may support minimal V3, but does not constitute full public digital verification.
profiles.low_agent_summary: Download one artifact, compute SHA-256, compare with declared hash for minimal V3.
profiles.copy_paste_claim_label: V3 (minimal; one valid declared hash computed)

repository_snapshot.claim_boundary: repository snapshot integrity only; not canonical mirror verification

physical_evidence_package.claim_boundary: public evidence package hash only; no physical object verification

profiles.name: Script-audited local verification
forbidden_claims: direct chain verification unless separately performed
profiles.low_agent_summary: Read script source code, then run official verification scripts locally.

profiles.name: Independent digital reproduction
hard_gates: use independent tool or independent implementation
reproduce at least one official verification result
compare against official script or manifest
forbidden_claims: full public digital verification unless all public components covered
profiles.low_agent_summary: Use independent tools to reproduce at least one official verification result.
profiles.if_missing_downgrade_to: V4 if only official scripts used

profiles.name: Full public digital verification
hard_gates: all required public digital targets checked
no physical claim above public evidence level
conditional_requirements: If NFT chain path is part of the claim, report N-level explicitly.
profiles.low_agent_summary: Verify all required public digital targets. List unavailable ones.
profiles.if_missing_downgrade_to: V4+ if not all public targets checked

profiles.name: Remote physical witness
conditional_requirements: If V5 was not achieved, digital limitations must be explicitly declared.
profiles.low_agent_summary: Live remote video session with nonce/challenge. Recorded video alone is NOT V6.
profiles.if_missing_downgrade_to: V5 if no live video with nonce

profiles.name: Onsite physical witness
forbidden_claims: final forensic identity unless P7/P8/P9 achieved
profiles.low_agent_summary: Onsite human witness with custody log and fresh capture. Remote video alone is NOT V7.

profiles.name: Advanced forensic / celestial attestation
hard_gates: onsite or equivalent high-integrity capture, or authorized celestial witness path
tool-assisted flaw analysis or celestial witness time attestation
advanced AI / algorithmic / microscopy comparison where available

minimum_component_requirements._note: Physical V8 path only. For T8-based V8, see minimum_component_requirements_any.

conditional_requirements: If Star-Moon Witness is invoked, T8 requires authorized non-public celestial witness data or a publishable challenge hash.
If competing object claim exists, P8 confidential flaw challenge is required.
If public final attestation is claimed, P9 multi-party forensic attestation is recommended.
forbidden_claims: public disclosure of confidential flaw data unless authorized
profiles.low_agent_summary: Tool-assisted forensic analysis with signed report. V8 does not create canonical authority.

claim_gate.required_for: technical verification claims, especially V3+ claims
claim_gate.note: Agents should use claim gate before submitting technical Verification Reports or Echoes that contain verification claims. Non-technical Echoes without verification claims do not require claim gate.
